tool.name: AnyLabeling Interactive
tool.description: Effortless data labeling with AI support from YOLO and Segment Anything!
tool.command:
export HOME=\$PWD &&
mkdir -p ./home/output ./home/input_images && chown -R 1000:1000 ./home &&
#for $i,$img in enumerate($input_images): ln -s '$img' './home/input_images/${img.element_identifier}' && #end for
#if $class_file: mkdir -p ./home/input_classes && ln -s '$class_file' './home/input_classes/${class_file.element_identifier}' && #end if
#if $annotations: mkdir -p ./home/input_annotations && #for $i,$ann in enumerate($annotations): ln -s '$ann' './home/input_annotations/${ann.element_identifier}' && #end for #end if
#if $models: #import glob,os mkdir -p ./home/input_models && tar -C ./home/input_models -xvf $models && #for $f in sorted(glob.glob("./home/input_models/*")): ln -s "$f" "./home/input_models/${os.path.basename($f)}" && #end for #end if
/init

param.name: models
param.label: A tarball containing custom model files and yaml files

tool.help:
**What it is**: AnyLabeling = LabelImg + Labelme + Improved UI + Auto-labeling
**Features**: - Image annotation for polygon, rectangle, circle, line and point. - Auto-labeling YOLOv8, Segment Anything (SAM, SAM2). - Text detection, recognition and KIE (Key Information Extraction) labeling. - Multiple languages availables: English, Vietnamese, Chinese.
**Custom Models**: - Loading custom models will enable you to use your own models for auto labeling. This is useful if you have a custom model that you have trained on your own data and want to use it for auto labeling.The supported model formats for YOLOv5, YOLOv8 and SegmentAnything is ONNX. - Sample models could be download from https://github.com/vietanhdev/anylabeling-assets/releases/tag/v0.4.0
